deep_dive.title: OpenRTLSet: A Fully Open-Source Dataset for Large Language Model-based Verilog Module Design
deep_dive.abstract: OpenRTLSet introduces the largest fully open-source dataset for hardware design, offering over 131,000 diverse Verilog code samples to the research community and industry. Our dataset uniquely combines Verilog code from GitHub repositories (102k modules), VHDL translations (5k modules), and synthesizable C/C++ translations (24k modules), all freely accessible without proprietary restrictions. Using the reasoning model DeepSeek-R1, we generated paired natural language descriptions for each code sample, enabling fine-tuning of various language model families (e.g., Qwen and Granite) for Verilog code generation. Our dataset explores multiple options, including Verilator-generated C++ files as additional context during labeling, quantization techniques (INT4 vs. BF16), and performance differences across model sizes (7B-32B parameters). OpenRTLSet demonstrates that open-source approaches can achieve superior performance in hardware design tasks, establishing a new foundation for accessible research and commercial use in this domain.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM dataset for Verilog module design enabling RTL code generation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 为基于LLM的Verilog模块设计提供大规模开源数据集，支持RTL代码生成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 为基于LLM的Verilog模块设计提供大规模开源数据集，支持RTL代码生成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 为基于LLM的Verilog模块设计提供大规模开源数据集，支持RTL代码生成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: OpenRTLSet introduces a large open-source dataset of 131k Verilog code samples with paired NL descriptions, enabling fine-tuning of LLMs for Verilog module design and potentially for RTL verification tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: OpenRTLSet提出了目前最大的全开源硬件设计数据集，包含超过13.1万个多样化的Verilog代码样本及其自然语言描述。该数据集结合了来自GitHub、VHDL翻译和可综合C/C++翻译的模块，并利用推理模型DeepSeek-R1生成描述，支持微调Qwen和Granite等语言模型用于Verilog代码生成。这项工作为硬件设计自动化和后续的RTL验证任务提供了关键数据基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: OpenRTLSet提出了目前最大的全开源硬件设计数据集，包含超过13.1万个多样化的Verilog代码样本及其自然语言描述。该数据集结合了来自GitHub、VHDL翻译和可综合C/C++翻译的模块，并利用推理模型DeepSeek-R1生成描述，支持微调Qwen和Granite等语言模型用于Verilog代码生成。这项工作为硬件设计自动化和后续的RTL验证任务提供了关键数据基础。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.
